title: Quick Input
description: Paste KOL investment opinion articles, AI auto-identifies KOL, tickers and sentiment

inputCard.title: Enter Article Content
inputCard.description: Paste article content or URL, the system will automatically identify KOLs and investment targets
inputCard.placeholder:
Paste KOL post content or article URL...

For example:
- Paste Twitter / X post URL (supports auto-extraction)
- Directly paste article content
- Manually enter opinion summary

tips.title: Usage Tips
tips.tip1: Supports pasting Twitter / X post URLs for auto-extraction and analysis
tips.tip2: Paste article content directly, AI will auto-identify KOL, stock tickers and sentiment
tips.tip3: AI results can be adjusted on the draft editing page
